title: Save Rhythm
brief: Use basic edits to complete a tiny checklist.
objectives: Mark the first two checklist items as done.
hints: Change [ ] to [x] on the first two checklist lines.
Search for stamp using /stamp, then use ciw on mission_two_pending.
primary_path: Move to each checklist line and replace one bracket space with `x` using `r`.
Jump to stamp with `/stamp`, then use `ciw` to set `mission_two_done`.
fallback_path: Use `cw` instead of `ciw` if that feels easier.
If edits get messy, run `./stage reset` and retry the same sequence.
why_path: Character replace (`r`) is fastest for checkbox toggles, and `ciw` is reliable for changing one status token.
pro_move: Use n to jump through repeated patterns after a search.
